# EnergySaver.Com.apple.EnergySaver.portable.ACPower

**Device Management Profile**

The laptop AC power Energy Saver settings.

## Declaration

```swift
object EnergySaver.Com.apple.EnergySaver.portable.ACPower
```

## Objects

- **EnergySaver.Com.apple.EnergySaver.desktop.ACPower**: The desktop AC power Energy Saver settings.
- **EnergySaver.Com.apple.EnergySaver.desktop.Schedule**: The schedule for turning the device on or off.
- **EnergySaver.Com.apple.EnergySaver.portable.BatteryPower**: The laptop battery power Energy Saver settings.
